word: H8186 - שַׁעֲרוּרָה - shaʻărûwrâh - shah-ar-oo-raw' - Horrible thing

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁעררת שׁעריריּה שׁערוּרה o

Transliteration: sha‛ărûrâh sha‛ărı̂yrı̂yâh sha‛ărûrith

Phonetic: shah-ar-oo-raw'

BDB Definition:

  1. horrible thing

Origin: from H8176 in the sense of H8175

TWOT entry: 2439b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
